title: With thanks to our 2017 peer reviewers - Canada.ca
content:
## With thanks to our 2017 peer reviewers
Download this article as a PDF (444 KB, 1 page)
https://doi.org/10.24095/hpcdp.38.3.06
We are grateful to the following  people for their significant contribution to Health Promotion and  Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada as peer reviewers in 2017. Their expertise  ensures the quality of our journal and promotes the sharing of new knowledge  among peers in Canada and internationally.
- Chris  Barrington-Leigh
- Tara Boelsen-Robinson
- Lisa  Bourque Bearskin
- Rachel  Engler-Stringer
- Samantha Gontijo-Guerra
- Linda  Greene-Finestone
- Sheilah  Hogg-Johnson
- Stephanie  Montesanti
- Alvaro Osornio-Vargas
- Marie-Claude Paquette
- Stephanie  Prince Ware
